answers.m1_clue: Texture/Lighting Errors: Unnatural perfect lighting, excessive cinematic gloss, or "plastic-like" skin.
answers.m2_clue: Natural Imperfections: Normal human asymmetry and a lack of overly polished, artificial perfection.
answers.m3_clue: Background/Text Errors: Unreadable or gibberish text, and illogical background elements.
answers.m4_clue: Logical Context: Identifiable real-world backgrounds and perfectly readable text.
answers.m5_clue: Natural Human Movements: Fluid body language and realistic, spontaneous facial expressions.
answers.m6_clue: Robotic Movements: Unnatural blinking patterns or stiff, robotic facial expressions.
answers.m7_clue: Flickering/Glitches: Morphing edges around the face or an unstable, flickering background.
answers.m8_clue: Natural Human Movements: Fluid body language and realistic, spontaneous facial expressions.
